name: Darksiders
description: Weathered gothic color — comic-book detail, post-apocalyptic grit, dramatic chiaroscuro with copper/bronze/charcoal palette and burnt-orange focal accents.
use_for: epic narrative covers, mythology and lore videos, character intros that need 'this matters' weight without the b&w of pure noir.

secondary.role: bronze / weathered-copper midtones on subject + environment

accent.role: burnt-orange single focal accent — molten metal, embers, eye glow

flux.positive_prefix: Darksiders gothic-fantasy concept-art illustration, weathered scratched bronze and stone surfaces, asymmetric heroic foreshortened pose, harsh apocalyptic backlight, charcoal + bronze + burnt-orange palette with deep shadow mass, smoky textured atmosphere, Joe Madureira ink register (Darksiders 2010 / Battle Chasers).
flux.positive_suffix: Single dramatic foreshortened figure, weathered worn materials (rust on metal, cracked stone, scorched leather), smoke or embers in rim-light, no clean polished surfaces, no studio-portrait composition.

always_add: weathered scratched bronze and stone surfaces
harsh apocalyptic backlight from a single direction
smoky textured atmosphere with embers or dust

native_canvas.rationale: game key-art / cinematic cover — widescreen lets the foreshortened figure read across the full apocalyptic horizon
